name: Stoba (Goat/lamb with Peppers)
recipeIngredient: 3 Habanero chiles (6 Jalapeno), stems removed, chopped
2 lbs Boneless lamb (goat), cut into 2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in oil; remove and drain.
2. Add the onions, garlic, celery, ginger, chiles, and bell pepper to the pan and sauté until the onions are soft.
3. Combine the meat, onion mixture, tomatoes, lime juice, cumin, allspice, and cover with water. Simmer the mixture until the meat is very tender and starts to fall apart, about 1 1/2 hours, adding more water if needed.
4. Add vinegar, cucumber, olives, and capers and simmer another 15 minutes.
